queries.question: Empirical analysis of loan duration in months as a determinant of reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: The contribution of lacking a checking account to elevated credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: Empirical analysis of checking account balances between 0 and 200 DM as a contributor to increased default likelihood.
